meta.title: Mombetsu City Oyama Ski Area
meta.description: Dive into Okhotsk Blue—hands-free powder between drift-ice tours, five minutes from downtown Mombetsu.

hero.eyebrow: Mombetsu, Hokkaido · Gateway to the Okhotsk
hero.title:
Oyama
Ski Area
hero.tagline: Fill the gap between Garinko cruises—10 minutes from town, ski above drift ice and the Okhotsk Sea.

quality.title:
Sea views,
city access.
quality.lead: Closer than Unabetsu—10 minutes from the Garinko pier. Area 1 is wide and mellow; from the summit, drift ice and downtown lights share the horizon.
quality.imgAlt: Skiers on Oyama with the Sea of Okhotsk in the background

primary.title: Garinko cross-sell
primary.lead: The best conversion moment is right after a drift-ice cruise—bundle ship ticket, 2-hour lift, and rental into a half-day Okhotsk loop.
primary.imgAlt: Garinko icebreaker and drift ice—half-day loop to Oyama

secondary.title: Hands-free ¥3,000
secondary.lead: Rental set ¥3,000, 2-hour ticket ¥1,600—multilingual signage and OTA prepay remove gear and language barriers for overseas visitors.

rental.title:
Travel light into
Okhotsk Blue.
rental.lead: Full set ¥3,000. Garinko visitors can drive straight from the marine center—bring your own hat and gloves.
rental.whisper: Proposed "Garinko × Oyama 2h Pass" web presale—book your post-cruise ski window in one click.
rental.imgAlt: Rental desk at Oyama—visit without your own gear

tour.title:
Drift ice, snow,
seafood.
tour.lead: A half-day, not a full one—Garinko cruise, seafood lunch, two hours at Oyama, then Monta-no-Yu onsen. Ski as the spice in a sightseeing day.
tour.imgAlt: Mombetsu half-day loop—drift ice, skiing, onsen, seafood

01.title: Garinko-go
01.body: Drift-ice breaker cruise from the marine center

03.title: Oyama Ski Area
03.body: Hands-free rental + 2-hour ticket with summit views

04.title: Monta-no-Yu
04.body: Natural spring water and sauna après-ski

driftIce.title: Drift ice × Oyama half-day guide
driftIce.body: Best Feb–Mar when ice reaches shore—Garinko in the morning, Oyama in the afternoon. If wind closes Area 2, Area 1 and the sky tower keep the day intact.

rentalGuide.title: Hands-free rental guide
rentalGuide.body: Set ¥3,000, 2-hour ticket ¥1,600. Digital multilingual guides and OTA prepay solve gear and language friction for overseas visitors.

okhotskTour.title: Okhotsk short-trip model
okhotskTour.body: Garinko (AM) → seafood bowl (lunch) → Oyama 2h (PM) → Monta-no-Yu (evening) → Marukaichi robata (night)—maximize spend from sightseers, not core skiers only.

access.note: ~10 min by car from downtown · Summit lift may close in high winds
access.rentacarLink: 女満別空港でレンタカー予約
access.rentacarNote: スカイチケット（外部サイト）
access.rentacarHint: 紋別市営大山スキー場周辺のドライブ向け
